headline: HII Showcases Next-Generation Autonomous Unmanned Maritime and LVC Capabilities at Combined Naval Event 2026
summary: FARNBOROUGH, United Kingdom, May 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) is showcasing its role as America’s largest military shipbuilder and a global leader in autonomous unmanned maritime systems at the Combined Naval Event (CNE) 2026, taking place May 19–21 at the Farnborough International Exhibition Centre in the United Kingdom.
